title: Chrellis

{{Quote|Though the Alliance had countless cells on thousands of planets, a single command headquarters was necessary for the Rebel leadership to rest and plan strategy. The first of these top-secret bases was established on a tiny planetoid in the Chrellis system, though the HQ was designed for continual relocation.|A Galactic Alliance historical document|<ref name="NEC" />}}
'''Chrellis''' was a tiny [[Planetoid/Legends|planetoid]] located in the [[Chrellis system/Legends|Chrellis system]],<ref name="NEC" /> a part of the [[Lahara sector/Legends|Lahara sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> Following the [[Corellian Treaty|foundation]] of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]<ref name="NEC" /> in [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]],<ref name="EGTW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref> the first [[High Command Base|base]] of the [[Alliance High Command/Legends|Alliance High Command]],<ref name="NEC" /> named [[Chrellis Base]],<ref name="AoR" /> was established on the planetoid<ref name="NEC" /> under the [[Commanding officer/Legends|command]] of the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna]].<ref name="NEGTC" />

When the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] reallocated its [[Sector fleet/Legends|sector fleets]], Chrellis Base became uncomfortably close to [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] activity.<ref name="AoR" /> The base, which had been designed for continual relocation,<ref name="NEC" /> was then moved to the [[Tion Cluster/Legends|Tion Cluster]]<ref name="AoR" /> [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|93|Briggia}}</ref> [[Brigia/Legends|Brigia]].<ref name="AoR" /> The fact that Chrellis hosted the first Alliance High Command base was eventually recorded in a [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]] [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] history [[The Essential Chronology|chronicle]] by the [[Historical Council]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]<ref name="TEC">[[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|''The Essential Chronology'']]</ref> as well as its [[36 ABY]] [[The New Essential Chronology (in-universe)|updated edition]] by the Council's incarnation under the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]].<ref name="NEC" />

==Behind the scenes==
Chrellis was first mentioned in ''[[The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook]]'', which was authored by [[Paul Murphy]] and published in [[1990]] for use with [[West End Games]]'s ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="TRAS">''[[The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook]]''</ref> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Chrellis [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Chrellis itself, in grid square M-5.<ref name="TEA" />
